title: Eli Lilly, Regeneron among first companies selected for FDA initiative to speed review of new manufacturing facilities
summary_full: Eli Lilly and Regeneron are among the first seven companies the FDA has selected for its PreCheck Pilot Program, CNBC has learned.
summary_public: Eli Lilly and Regeneron are among the first seven companies the FDA has selected for its PreCheck Pilot Program, CNBC has learned.
